privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the standard OpenRocket example 'simple_model_rocket.ork', which is confirmed to be non-synthetic. The export paths for the modified rocket and performance report accurately match the agent instructions and export scripts. The claimed body tube radius of 0.0133m is incorrect; parsing the actual .ork file reveals a radius of 0.0125m. The length parameters (0.015m to 0.150m) are verified to match the verifier logic, despite differing slightly from the prompt instructions (20mm to 100mm).
